falsification_conditions.condition: The price of the asset rises above the 200-day moving average by at least 15% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this key technical level would indicate a bullish trend, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would confirm extreme market volatility or a topping pattern, refuting the current 'HOLD' signal and proving the UNKNOWN verdict incorrect.

falsification_conditions.condition: The pattern similarity to bottom_2024_aug drops below 60% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant divergence from the historical pattern would invalidate the basis of the current analysis, proving the UNKNOWN verdict is no longer applicable.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
